segments.text: In the year that Tartan came unto Ashdod, (when Sargon the king of Assyria sent him,) and fought against Ashdod, and took it;
Go and loose the sackcloth from off thy loins, and put off thy shoe from thy foot.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And he did so, walking naked and barefoot.

footnotes: by: Heb. by the hand of

segments.text: Like as my servant Isaiah hath walked naked and barefoot three years for a sign and wonder upon Egypt and upon Ethiopia;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So shall the king of Assyria lead away the Egyptians prisoners, and the Ethiopians captives, young and old, naked and barefoot, even with their buttocks uncovered, to the shame of Egypt.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

footnotes: the Egyptians…: Heb. the captivity of Egypt

segments.text: And they shall be afraid and ashamed of Ethiopia their expectation, and of Egypt their glory.
Behold, such is our expectation, whither we flee for help to be delivered from the king of Assyria: and how shall we escape?
segments.speaker: Inhabitant of the isle
